original_image_tags: The page is a typewritten government memo on aged, off-white paper. There are two punched holes at the top. Several handwritten annotations in blue, red, and pencil are visible in the margins and bottom section.

elements.description: A typed Office Memorandum from the United States Government, dated October 2, 1949, from SAC, Pittsburgh to Director, FBI, regarding 'GLEN SPROUSE, Informant' and 'FLYING DISCS, MISCELLANEOUS'.
